chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Inheritance of the Followers of Different Religions

text:
5725 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ أَبِي وَلاَّدٍ اَلْحَنَّاطِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ يَقُولُ :
" اَلْمُسْلِمُ يَرِثُ اِمْرَأَتَهُ اَلذِّمِّيَّةَ وَ هِيَ لاَ تَرِثُهُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5725 - Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abu Walad Al-Hannat who said:
I heard Abu Abdullah (as) say: "A Muslim man inherits from his dhimmi (non-Muslim under Islamic protection) wife, but she does not inherit from him."
